Home.title: BE@RBRICK Pop-up Store
Home.description: Next.js 15 storefront initialized with WooCommerce, Zustand cart, and next-intl.

atelier.title: A luxury first look at the next BE@RBRICK drop.
atelier.description: Full-bleed campaign storytelling with gallery-inspired motion, tactile navigation, and a premium editorial pace.

midnight.title: Immersive launches staged like a private vault opening.
midnight.description: Looping GSAP transitions keep the hero alive while spotlighting limited editions, timed drops, and collector momentum.

salon.title: Designed for premium storytelling across every screen.
salon.description: Swipe-ready behavior, refined overlays, and elegant pacing make the landing page feel closer to a luxury exhibition than a standard store front.

whatsOn.title: What's On
whatsOn.description: A quick look at the limited drops, previews, and collector moments happening right now.

dropWeekend.title: Weekend capsule release
dropWeekend.description: A short-run BE@RBRICK colorway drop with limited inventory across the pop-up edit.

studioPreview.title: Studio concept preview
studioPreview.description: An early look at upcoming pieces and campaign visuals before the next public launch.

collectorNight.title: Collector night early access
collectorNight.description: Member-only access to selected pieces, early checkout windows, and special packaging.
